title: echinocereus ortegae subsp. koehresianus
intro: Echinocereus ortegae subsp. koehresianus is a cactus species, belonging to the Echinocereus genus, that is native to Mexico. The plant's stems and flowers are used to prepare herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Echinocereus ortegae subsp. koehresianus include wound healing, reducing inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into salves, creams, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties for topical application.
